description: The 3 Sprint 3 tests never invoke select_past_note — the function under review. Instead, they manually replicate the internal body-extraction logic, call scan_vault_feed and make_editing_state_changed_payload directly, and assert on the helper output. Because they do not exercise the actual handler, the tests would pass even if select_past_note were refactored to remove the editing_session_state_changed emit entirely. The only 'test' of the handler itself is Rust compilation (the handler must type-check against the function signature).
